rationale: Educ. Code §12.117 governs open-enrollment charter school admission procedures and is wholly unrelated to the residence homestead exemption amount in Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 12.117. ADMISSION. (a) For admission to an open-enrollment charter school, the governing body of the school shall:
_note: Rule text concerns charter school admissions; no nexus to homestead exemption or property tax.
